[dBoing] Gunma Kisaragi's Jissen Kureemu Taiou Manyuaru (english translation)
description:
This is dBoing's first attempt at "scanlation." We chose Gunma Kisaragi's "Jissen Kureemu Taiou Manyuaru," which we translated to "Practiced Claims Response Manual," for a couple reasons. It is one of our favorites; it has nothing to do with school students or teenagers, which is somewhat rare for Kisaragi; and we are fans of Kisaragi's work.   
  
This scan is the fifth story in the "Love Selection" tankoubon and has been heavily edited in the sense that we took out all the Japanese gitaigo and giseigo, the mimetic and onomatopoeic words, and replaced them with, usually rough, English interpretations.   
  
We hope you enjoy this release.  
  
[![](http://fapomatic.com/thumbs/0932/jissen_kureemu_taiou_manyuaru_thumbnails_1.jpg)](http://fapomatic.com/show.php?loc=0932&f=jissen_kureemu_taiou_manyuaru_thumbnails_1.jpg)
